symbols.signature: let { shipped, mobileColIndex, onOpenDetail, relTime, prUrl, ticketUrl }: { shipped: { extId: string; title: string; prNumber?: number | null; doneAt?: string | null }[]; mobileColIndex: number; onOpenDetail: (extId: string) => void; relTime: (iso: string | null) => string; prUrl: (n: number) => string; ticketUrl: (extId: string) => string; } = $props();
symbols.note: Current prop shape before change. `onOpenDetail` and `ticketUrl` are removed by this plan; all other props stay unchanged.

symbols.type_text: interface ProviderStatus { provider: string; status: 'healthy' | 'cooldown'; activeAgents: number; maxConcurrent: number; tiers: string[]; cooldownUntil: string | null; }
symbols.note: Type stays — still used by factory-floor.ts / factory-floor-filters.ts (AttentionStrip cooldowns). Do not remove.

call_graph.note: Presentation-only change. FactoryFloor.svelte imports and renders both ShippedColumn and ProviderStatus. buildAttention(hall, providerHealth) in factory-floor.ts (called from getFactoryFloorData) is independent of the ProviderStatus.svelte widget and must keep receiving providerHealth data unchanged.

impact_files.s1_budget: nicht-baselined (kein Ratchet-Limit aktiv, normales Limit gilt)
impact_files.change: Remove `import ProviderStatus from './ProviderStatus.svelte'` (line 16) and `<ProviderStatus providerHealth={data.providerHealth} />` (line 188). Remove `onOpenDetail={openDetail}` and `{ticketUrl}` from the `<ShippedColumn>` invocation (currently around lines 247-254).

impact_files.s1_budget: nicht-baselined (kein Ratchet-Limit aktiv, normales Limit gilt)
impact_files.change: Add `let openTitles = $state(new Set<string>())`; remove `onOpenDetail`/`ticketUrl` from props; replace the `<a href={ticketUrl(s.extId)}>` ticket-number link with a `<button>` that toggles `s.extId` membership in `openTitles`; render the title `<button>` only when `openTitles.has(s.extId)`; relTime/PR badge markup unchanged.
Delete file entirely (no other consumers found via repo-wide grep).

risks.note: Server-side providerHealth query (website/src/lib/factory-floor.ts) and the ProviderStatus type in factory-floor-types.ts are intentionally NOT touched — still needed by AttentionStrip cooldown chips.
